description: A quality engineer needs to upgrade an existing Quality Control Point from a simple pass/fail check to a measurement-based check with specific dimensional tolerances. For the Quality Control Point titled 'Dimensional Check - Cabinet with Doors', set the type to 'Measure' with a Norm of 150.0, a Min Tolerance of 145.0, and a Max Tolerance of 155.0. The browser is already open and logged into Odoo, showing the Quality Control Points list view.
